resources.string: Log in, create an account, or use an affiliate invite code to unlock your Dex dashboard.
Your dashboard, voice tools, lessons, plans, and assistant controls are all in one place.

Most people should leave this on the live Dex server. Hosted Dex backends should use https. For local testing, use http://10.0.2.2:3001/api in the emulator or http://YOUR_COMPUTER_IP:3001/api on a phone using the same Wi-Fi. Port 4000 is usually the wrong local URL for Dex.
Paste the code from your admin or affiliate invite here, then Dex will open the signup flow for you.
Affiliate invite code applied. Finish signup below.
Enter the affiliate invite code first.
Track your Dex chats, language lessons, and quiz progress here.
See your promo code, commissions, and referrals in one place.
Withdrawals will use your Stripe verification once payout setup is live.
Manage backend access, affiliate codes, and platform health from here.
Pick a look for Dex, then change the home text if you want it to feel more personal.
Choose a style first. Open advanced colors only if you want a more custom look.
Add a background image or stickers to make Dex feel more like your own space.
Home style reset to Dex default.
Dex could not open your image picker right now.
Set your language profile, pull a fresh lesson, and quiz yourself right from your dashboard.
Learning %1$s at %2$s level with a %3$s focus.
Set your language profile to start lessons and quizzes.
Dex could not save your learning profile.
Dex could not build a lesson.
I built your lesson, %1$s. Here is the first part: %2$s
Dex could not build a quiz.
I built your quiz, %1$s. Here is the first question: %2$s
Tell Dex how to support you when you are overwhelmed, what grounding style feels best, and whether a trusted contact can be notified in an emergency.
Dex can support you with a calm tone and gentle grounding when you are having a hard moment.
Allow Dex to notify my trusted contact in an emergency
Let Dex keep checking in after a distress moment
Dex could not save your safety profile.
Dex will send a support check-in in about one minute.
Hey, Dex is checking in on you. Take a breath, drink some water if you can, and open Dex if you want support.
Supportive follow-up reminders after hard moments.
If you talk about self-harm or hurting someone, Dex will slow down, respond with support, and use your saved emergency plan. Trusted contact: %1$s. Contact alerts: %2$s. Follow-up check-ins: %3$s.
If you talk about self-harm or hurting someone, Dex will slow down, respond with support, and guide you toward urgent help. Trusted contact: not set. Contact alerts: %1$s. Follow-up check-ins: %2$s.
Let Dex build useful dashboard sections for daily structure, meals, and routines.
Custom section idea (example: weekend reset plan)
Tell Dex what kind of section to add first.
Dex could not add that section.
Dex could not build your daily plan.
Dex could not build your diet plan.
%1$d day(s) left in your Dex trial. Subscribe now so your access rolls over without interruption.
Your Dex subscription is active. Manage payment method or billing details anytime.
Your trial or subscription has ended. Subscribe to keep using Dex.
This account already has unlimited Dex access.
Dex could not open Stripe checkout.
Dex could not open the billing portal.

These switches control Dex features on your account. Android will also show a device-level disclosure and permission prompt before Dex can use phone, contacts, microphone, or notifications on this device.
Allow Dex to connect to phone features
Allow Dex to manage calendar events
Android runtime permissions still need approval on this device.
Android runtime permissions are granted for phone state, contacts, call controls, microphone, and notifications.

Dex AI Assistant uses phone state and contacts to announce callers, answer or decline calls you approve, and place calls for saved contacts. Dex uses microphone access for voice commands like "Hey Dex" and "answer," and notifications for reminders and background status. Dex does not need call log access for these features. You can turn Dex features off later in Dex settings or Android system settings.
If Dex is quiet outside the app, open these phone settings and give Dex unrestricted battery, pop-up notifications, and background activity access.
On Samsung, remove Dex from sleeping apps and set Battery to Unrestricted for the best outside-the-app results.
Dex could not open that settings screen.
Use this section to confirm Dex can speak on your phone before testing incoming-call prompts.
Dex voice is ready on this phone.
Dex voice engine is not ready yet.
Dex needs Android text-to-speech set up on this phone.
Wake engine: offline wake-word support is configured for Dex.
Wake engine: Dex is still using the basic wake fallback until the offline Vosk model and wake phrase are added.
Wake-word setup saved. Restart wake mode to use it.
Add the Vosk model folder name from the app assets and the exact wake phrase you want Dex to hear.
Vosk model folder name (for example model-en-us)
Add both the model folder name and wake phrase.
Dex could not start the offline wake engine, so it is using the basic wake fallback for now.
Dex could not open Android voice setup.
Dex is ready in the background
Dex will stay ready after sign-in so it can screen spam and answer allowed calls without reopening the app.
Keeps Dex available for phone and voice support while the app is not front and center.
Hey, I am Dex. Your voice assistant is connected and ready to help.
Keep Dex listening while this app is open. Say "Hey Dex" and then ask for help, a task, or a little company.
Dex is ready. Say "Hey Dex" whenever you want me.
Dex is ready for the custom wake phrase.
Dex is listening for the wake phrase.
Dex went back to waiting. Say "Hey Dex" when you want me again.
I am here. What do you need?
Okay. I will be quiet until you wake me again.
Log in first so Dex can respond with your account.
Add your backend URL before starting wake mode.
Microphone permission is still needed for wake mode.
Wake mode is not available on this device.
I had trouble reaching the Dex chat service just now.
You just got a notification from %1$s. Do you want me to read it?
There is not a recent notification for me to read back.
Okay, I will ignore that notification.
I prepared that for your approval.
I am ready to text %1$s. The message says: %2$s. Say yes send to send it, or cancel.
I am ready to text %1$s. Tell me what you want the message to say, or say cancel.
I am ready to email %1$s. The message says: %2$s. Say approve to open it, or cancel.
I am ready to email %1$s. Tell me what you want the message to say, or say cancel.
I drafted a calendar item for %1$s.
%1$s is on your Dex calendar now.
I could not create that appointment.
I can save %1$s as a new contact.
Approve this and Android will open a contact draft with the number filled in so you can verify the caller and save the name.
I opened a new contact draft for %1$s.
I could not find a phone contact for %1$s.
I could not find an email contact for %1$s.
I found %1$s in your contacts. Say call, text, or email.
Who would you like me to call?
Who would you like me to text?
Who would you like me to email?
What would you like me to text %1$s?
I heard this text for %1$s: %2$s. Say yes use that, yes send, or say it again.
Try again with the exact saved contact name.
I opened a message draft for %1$s so you can type or dictate the text.
I opened an email draft for %1$s so you can type or dictate the message.
I opened the text draft for %1$s.
I could not send the text to %1$s directly, so I opened the draft instead.
Dex needs Android text-message permission before it can send texts for you. I opened the draft instead.
I opened the email draft for %1$s.
I could not find %1$s on this phone yet.
Dex needs Android phone-call permission before it can place calls for you.
I could not open that action on this phone.
You do not have any Dex appointments yet.
You do not have any matching appointments for that day.
When phone access is enabled and Android permissions are granted, Dex can watch for calls, block likely spam, and help you handle calls while the app or background service is active.
Call monitoring is waiting for login, backend phone permission, and Android runtime access.
Dex call monitoring is active and ready to help with allowed calls on this device.
Auto-answer saved contacts outside the app
Auto-answer any non-spam caller outside the app
Dex auto-answered %1$s because they are in your saved contacts.
Incoming call from %1$s. Use the Dex notification to answer, decline, or take a message.
Incoming call from %1$s. Say pick up, reject, answer on speaker, or take a message. You can also use the buttons on screen.
Incoming call from %1$s. Use the Dex notification to answer or decline without opening the app.
Dex is speaking the incoming call prompt.
Dex is trying to answer the ringing call.
Dex could not answer the ringing call.
Dex is missing the Android call-answer permission on this device.
Dex did not find a ringing call to answer.
Dex could not decline the ringing call.
Dex is listening for a call command.
Dex is still listening for your call command.
Voice commands are not available on this device right now.
Dex blocked a likely spam call.
I turned on speaker for this call.
There is no active call for me to put on speaker.
There is no ringing call for me to take a message from right now.
I declined the call from %1$s, saved a follow-up task, and drafted a text so you can ask for the message.
I declined the call from %1$s and saved a follow-up task for you.
I saved a follow-up task and drafted a text for %1$s.
Approve this and Android will open a text draft asking %1$s to send their message.
I am tied up right now. Please text me the message you wanted to leave and I will get back to you as soon as I can.
You are connected to Dex on this phone.
Log in or create an account to start using Dex.
Dex did not return a login token.
Dex could not sign you in.
You just got a text from %1$s. Do you want me to read it to you?
What would you like me to text back to %1$s?
Okay. I will leave the text from %1$s unread aloud.
Lets Dex show answer, decline, read, and reply actions while the app stays closed.
Answer or decline with Dex right from this notification.
Dex settings synced on this phone.
Daily nudges from Dex to keep learning going.
Open Dex for your lesson and keep your streak going.
Time for some %1$s %2$s with Dex. Open the app and keep your streak going.
Dex will remind you about learning each day at %1$s on this phone.
Your day looks open right now. Dex can help you plan the next step.
Dex also recommends a quick %1$s lesson.
